C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\roguelike_cpp.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\roguelike_cpp.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\roguelike_cpp.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -finput-charset=UTF-8 -fexec-charset=UTF-8 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\roguelike_cpp.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o roguelike_cpp.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libroguelike_cpp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\roguelike_cpp.dir\linkLibs.rsp
